seo.title: Fiberglass Pool Colors — Gelcoat & Iridium Finishes
seo.description: Explore the full range of San Juan fiberglass pool colors. Classic gelcoat finishes and premium Iridium options — UV stabilized, chemical resistant, and stunning.
seo.ogDescription: Browse all fiberglass pool color finishes. Gelcoat and Iridium options from San Juan Pools.

hero.subtitle: Choose from four stunning gelcoat finishes. Each color is UV-stabilized, corrosion-resistant, and engineered to last decades.

selector.intro: Click a color below to preview how it transforms your pool. Each finish is available on every pool model in our collection.

colors.name: Blue Lagoon
colors.description: Bring vacation vibes right to your backyard. Blue Lagoon captures the essence of the Caribbean — a bright, inviting hue that makes your pool water look crystal clear and vibrant.

colors.name: Granite
colors.description: Granite offers a sleek, elegant look that pairs perfectly with modern landscapes. Its deep, stone-like tone enhances the contrast of surrounding pavers and greenery.

colors.name: Sully Blue
colors.description: Soft and soothing, Sully Blue evokes a sense of calm and balance. It's ideal for homeowners who love minimalist design and subtle luxury.

colors.name: White
colors.description: A timeless favorite. White gives your pool a bright, clear appearance and highlights the water's natural shimmer. Perfect for a clean, classic aesthetic.

benefitsSection.intro: Every gelcoat finish is precision-engineered to deliver beauty and performance that stands the test of time.

benefits.title: UV Protection
benefits.description: Built-in UV inhibitors prevent fading and discoloration, even under direct sunlight year after year.

benefits.title: Low Maintenance
benefits.description: Smooth gelcoat surface requires minimal upkeep — no resurfacing or repainting needed.

benefits.title: Corrosion Resistant
benefits.description: Engineered to withstand pool chemicals, salt systems, and harsh weather without degradation.

benefits.title: Decades of Beauty
benefits.description: Colors stay vibrant for 25+ years thanks to advanced gelcoat technology and premium pigments.

finishSection.intro: Depending on the color you choose, your pool will feature one of two advanced finish systems, each engineered for exceptional longevity.

finishStandard.title: Standard Finish
finishStandard.subtitle: NPG/ISO-Based Gelcoat
finishStandard.paragraph: Our standard finish uses a high-quality NPG/ISO-based gelcoat that is UV-stabilized and corrosion-resistant from day one. This proven formulation has protected fiberglass pools for decades.
items: Pools with this finish are well over 25 years old

finishIridium.title: Iridium Finish
finishIridium.subtitle: Solid Surface Material
finishIridium.paragraph: The Iridium finish is a premium solid surface material featuring oven-cured colored chips suspended in a UV and chemical-resistant resin. This advanced system is backed by a color-matched gelcoat barrier coat for unmatched depth and durability.

finalCta.paragraph: Not sure which gelcoat finish is right for your backyard? Our team will help you choose the perfect color to match your landscape and style.
